subject: Use latest ONAP SDK
commit_message:
Use latest ONAP SDK

Update requirements to use ONAPSDK 12.3.1 version

Issue-ID: INT-2137
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I182303a317fc784aa95788e40a1612776e77d122
